patterns.description: Left rail of stage nodes, with each stage's entries rendered inline to the right in reading order top-to-bottom.
Sticky stage rail so rail stays visible while body scrolls.
Composer (add observation) CTA appears only on current stage for students; teacher impersonation unlocks composer on all stages.
Compact modal for add/edit forms; fullscreen lightbox for photo originals.
patterns.implementation: Reuse existing ObservationEditor modal + NoPhotoReasonModal + plant-lightbox.

patterns.description: Whole student-row in teacher summary is a link target to student drill-down.
Subtle badge marks observations edited by a teacher.
patterns.rationale: Schema change (editorId) blocked; feedback marks this nice-to-have.

patterns.description: Owner-only subroute /board/[id]/student/[studentId] renders the student's plant in edit mode for the teacher.
patterns.implementation: Server component with classroom-ownership gate; 403 otherwise.
